original_snippet_context: A discussion in the Câmara (Chamber of Deputies) regarding a financial project (likely related to the Caixa de Conversão given the broader context). The session is adjourned before key speakers can present their arguments.
relevant_quote: tremendo ataque que acabava de soffrer o projecto da commissão de finanças e as respectivas emendas
justification: The text describes strong opposition to the financial project and its amendments, but doesn't explicitly link it to the specifics of the Caixa de Conversão or the orthodox/expansionist positions.
